content.name: Pokey's Weapon Mod Rebalance
content.description: Rebalances weapon equipment mods into meaningful choices: damage output is pinned to mod quality (Basic × 1.15, Enhanced × 1.26, Exceptional × 1.44), mods within a tier differ by role instead of raw DPS, and there is NO roll RNG - every mod gives exactly its printed value, so what you craft is what you get. Numbers only - no new wares, savegame-safe.
content.author: Pokey

text.name: Pokey's Weapon Mod Rebalance
text.description: Rebalances weapon equipment mods into meaningful choices: damage output is pinned to mod quality, mods within a tier differ by role instead of raw DPS, and there is no roll RNG - every mod gives exactly its printed value. Numbers only - no new wares, savegame-safe.
text.author: Pokey
